text: Office pantry mein unhe mere accent ka mazaak udate suna toh dil baith gaya, par mere paas rone ka waqt nahi hai kyunki login karke client delivery deni hai aur sham ko bacche ki PTM bhi hai. Ek divorced mother hone ke naate mujhe pata hai ki agar main zara bhi rukki toh log kahenge ki main ghar-bahar kuch nahi sambhal sakti. Thakan se poora sharir toot raha hai par structural endurance hi meri majboori hai kyunki main afford nahi kar sakti ki bacchon ki school fees mein ek din ki bhi deri ho.

Mera accent unke liye joke hai, par mere liye ye din-raat ki coding ka nishaan hai jo main bacchon ki parvarish aur unki 'izzat' bachane ke liye kar rahi hoon. Dual burden itna zyada hai ki dimaag blank ho chuka hai, par main break nahi le sakti kyunki mujh par poore khandaan ki zimmedari hai. Main exhausted hoon par mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta, bas ek machine ki tarah deadlines poori kiye ja rahi hoon.

Colleague ke tano ke baad dil kiya ki laptop band kar doon, par phir yaad aaya ki home loan ki kist baki hai aur widowed hone ke baad main akeli hi breadwinner hoon. Samaj mein community exclusion ka darr hamesha rehta hai, isliye main apni insult bhool kar bas bacchon ki schooling aur 'samaj' ki umeedon ke liye kaam mein lagi hoon. Mere liye mental health ek luxury hai jo main abhi afford nahi kar sakti, bas endurance hi meri pehchaan hai.

Accent ka mazaak sunkar laga ki shayad main is corporate duniya ke kabil nahi, par phir bacchon ka chehra yaad aa gaya jinke liye mujhe 'izzat' se rehna hai. Working bahu hone ke naate ghar ke kaamo aur office ke deadlines ke beech main pis gayi hoon, par main thakne ka bahana nahi bana sakti. Main afford nahi kar sakti ki bacchon ko koi financial kami mehsus ho, isliye main bas bina ruke ek structural endurance dikha rahi hoon.

Logon ke mazak aur office ki politics ne mujhe tod diya hai, par bacchon ki schooling aur unki parvarish ke liye main har din double shift karti hoon. Single mother hone ki wajah se 'log kya kahenge' wala darr hamesha rehta hai, isliye main thakan mein bhi har 'duty' nibhati hoon taaki koi ungli na utha sake. Mera dimaag kahta hai ruk jao, par meri zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai jisne mujhe chalne par majboor kar rakha hai.
